content.query:
CREATE VIEW BI_InvoicedOrders
-- Drop view BI_InvoicedOrders
-- select top 100 * from BI_InvoicedOrders where Year = '2026' order by 'Invoice Date' DESC

AS

SELECT DISTINCT

    TRY_CAST(
            LEFT(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), H.IVDT), 4) + '-' + 
            SUBSTRING(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), H.IVDT), 5, 2) + '-' + 
            RIGHT(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), H.IVDT), 2) AS DATE) AS [Invoice Date],
    H.YEA4 AS [Year],
    CONVERT(VARCHAR(20),H.EXIN) AS [Extended Invoice Number],
    CONVERT(VARCHAR(20),H.IVNO) AS [Invoice Number],
    H.ORNO AS [Order Number],
    H.ORTP AS [Order Type],
    H.CUNO AS [Customer Number],
    H.PYNO AS [Payer],
    H.ADID AS [Address ID],
    L.ITNO AS [Item Number],
    IM.ITGR AS [Product Line],
    IM.ITCL AS [Brand],
    L.PONR AS [Order Line],
    L.POSX AS [Line Suffix],
    L.LNCL AS [Line Classification],
    L.IVQT AS [Qty],
    L.SAPR AS [Unit Price],
    L.UCOS AS [Unit Cost],
    CASE WHEN LNCL = 2 THEN 0 ELSE (L.IVQT * L.SAPR * H.RAIN) END AS [Dollar Amount],
    CASE WHEN LNCL = 2 THEN 0 ELSE L.DCOS END AS [Total Cost],
    L.WHLO AS [Warehouse],
    L.CUOR AS [Customer PO],
    L.DLIX AS [Delivery Number],
    COALESCE(OA.CUNM, OA2.CUNM, OC.CUNM) AS [Ship to Name],
    COALESCE(OA.CUA1, OA2.CUA1, OC.CUA1) AS [Ship to Address 1],
    COALESCE(OA.CUA2, OA2.CUA2, OC.CUA2) AS [Ship to Address 2],
    COALESCE(OA.TOWN, OA2.TOWN, OC.TOWN) AS [Ship to City],
    COALESCE(OA.ECAR, OA2.ECAR, OC.ECAR) AS [Ship to State],
    COALESCE(OA.PONO, OA2.PONO, OC.PONO) AS [Ship to Zip Code],
    COALESCE(OA.CSCD, OA2.CSCD, OC.CUA4) AS [Ship to Country],
    OC.CUNM AS [Bill to Name],
    OC.CUA1 AS [Bill to Address 1],
    OC.CUA2 AS [Bill to Address 2],
    OC.TOWN AS [Bill to City],
    OC.ECAR AS [Bill to State],
    OC.PONO AS [Bill to Zip Code],
    OC.CUA4 AS [Bill to Country],
    OO.RGDT AS [Order Entry Date]

FROM M3.ODHEAD H

LEFT JOIN M3.ODLINE L ON H.ORNO = L.ORNO AND H.EXIN = L.EXIN AND H.DLIX = L.DLIX
LEFT JOIN M3.OOHEAD OO ON H.ORNO = OO.ORNO
LEFT JOIN M3.MITMAS IM ON L.ITNO = IM.ITNO
LEFT JOIN M3.OCUSMA OC ON H.CUNO = OC.CUNO 
LEFT JOIN M3.OOADRE OA ON H.ORNO = OA.ORNO AND OA.ADRT = '1' AND H.ADID = OA.ADID
LEFT JOIN M3.OCUSAD OA2 ON H.CUNO = OA2.CUNO AND H.ADID = OA2.ADID AND H.ADID <> '' AND OA2.ADRT = '1'

WHERE H.IVNO <> 0 AND H.YEA4 >= '2022'
